title: World of Life - Rekindled
description: An updated version of my challenge pack
body:
[World of Life](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/world-of-live-pixelbraker) was originally supposed to be a small pack with a slightly higher challenge than vanilla. Instead, it turned into an unxepectidly tough challange, giving monsters wallhacks, letting creepers breach walls, and so on...

____

Rekindled aims to capture that feeling of dread and frustration in a new light, using [Nox: Renoxed](https://modrinth.com/mod/nox-renoxed/versions) and [Mythic Metals](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythicmetals) as a basis.

____

Other notable mods include:
- Waystones & Lootr
- ReMorphed
- Gallosphere & Perlinecent Caves
- Respawnable Pets
- End Remastered & Dragon Fight Remastered
- Things
- True Darkness
- And the YOUNGS suite
